name: Hip Bump
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Hands Behind Back, Change of Places Left to Right, Change of Places Right to Left, Chugging, Fallaway Throwaway, Hip Bump, Miami Special, Shoulder Spin, Simple Spin, Spanish Arms, Stop and Go, Whip Throwaway, Windmill
following_figure_names: Link, Change of Places Left to Right, Change of Hands Behind Back, Hip Bump, American Spin (from L to R hand hold), Stop and Go
notes:
Start in Open Position.
When bumping "hip", it's more comfortable to bump a little lower at upper leg level.
Could do L shoulder against lady's R shoulder.
Keep L arm still.

steps.action: Begin Link step moving left foot forward
Forward chasse LRL ending in left side position
comments: retract L arm, taking it slightly fwd.
could do L shoulder against lady's R shoulder
when bumping "hip"- it's more comfortable to bump a little lower at upper leg level.

steps.action: Side chasse to the right ending back in open position
comments: extend L arm to normal open position

steps.action: Begin Link step moving right foot forward
Forward chasse RLR ending in left side position
comments: hold position and bump R hip with Man's L hip | no turn
when bumping "hip"- it's more comfortable to bump a little lower at upper leg level.

steps.action: Side chasse to the left ending back in open position
